# init(transformComponent:)

**Initializer**

Initializes a transform object to match the specified transform component.

## Declaration

```swift
convenience init(transformComponent component: any MDLTransformComponent)
```

## Parameters

- **component**: The component whose transform information is to be copied.

## Return Value

A new transform object.

## Discussion

Use this method to copy transformation from any object that adopts the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransformComponent] protocol (such as another [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTransform] instance).

## Creating a Transform Object

- **init(identity:)**: Initializes a transform object to the identity transformation.
- **init(matrix:)**: Initializes a transform object with the specified transform matrix.
- **init(matrix:resetsTransform:)**
- **init(transformComponent:resetsTransform:)**
